query:
UPDATE playlists p 
        SET
            total_duration = total_duration - (sub.occurences * $1),
            song_count = song_count - sub.occurences
        FROM (
            SELECT playlist_id, count(*) as occurences
            FROM playlist_songs
            WHERE song_id = $2
            GROUP BY playlist_id
        ) AS sub
            WHERE p.id = sub.playlist_id
